hero.description: Our platform allows students to learn about chemistry laboratory instruments through 3D models in Augmented Reality.

step1.title: Explore instruments and molecules
step1.description: Access different catalogs with 3D models of instruments and molecular structures with resources designed to facilitate chemistry learning.

step2.title: Observe each model in detail
step2.description: Interact with each model from any angle. Rotate, zoom, and explore instruments and molecules as if they were in front of you in a real laboratory.

step3.title: Bring the laboratory to your environment
step3.description: Visualize models on real surfaces using your device's camera. Learn chemistry in a more dynamic, visual, and immersive way.

nosotros.title: About Us
nosotros.description: RALQ is an educational platform focused on improving chemistry learning through interactive 3D models and Augmented Reality experiences accessible from any device.

y2023.p1: RALQ development began with the idea of creating a more visual and interactive educational experience for students.
y2023.p2: The project foundations and initial ideas for integrating educational 3D models were defined.

y2024.p1: New interfaces, visual systems, and sections focused on the exploration of instruments and molecules were developed.
y2024.p2: The experience on computers, tablets, and mobile phones was also improved.

y2025.p1: RALQ evolved into a more complete platform with interactive catalogs, 3D visualization, and Augmented Reality experiences.
y2025.p2: The main focus was to offer a modern, accessible, and easy-to-use educational tool.

mejoras.title: Constant Evolution
mejoras.p1: We will continue to add new models, tools, and interactive educational experiences.
mejoras.p2: Our goal is to make chemistry learning more visual, accessible, and easy to understand.

faq.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for?

items.question: What is RALQ and what is its goal?
items.answer: RALQ is an interactive educational platform focused on chemistry learning through 3D models and Augmented Reality experiences. Its goal is to help students understand instruments, molecular structures, and visual concepts without the need to be physically inside a laboratory.

items.question: What kind of content can I find within the RALQ platform?
items.answer: Within the platform, you can explore catalogs of laboratory instruments, interactive molecular models, and an informative periodic table. Each section was designed to offer a visual, dynamic, and easy-to-understand experience for students.

items.question: How do the interactive 3D models work within the platform?
items.answer: 3D models can be viewed directly from the browser on compatible computers and mobile devices. You can rotate, zoom, and explore them from different angles to observe important details of each structure or instrument.

items.question: What does the Augmented Reality function in RALQ allow?
items.answer: The Augmented Reality function allows projecting digital models onto real surfaces using your device's camera. This helps students observe instruments and molecules in a more immersive and close way.

items.question: Is it necessary to install additional applications to use the platform?
items.answer: No. RALQ works directly from compatible browsers, so you don't need to download external applications. Only a device with internet access and basic 3D visualization and camera compatibility is required.

items.question: Can RALQ completely replace a real chemistry laboratory?
items.answer: RALQ was created as a complementary educational tool to support visual and interactive chemistry learning. Although it facilitates the understanding of many concepts, it does not replace supervised practices within a professional laboratory.

privacidad.title: Privacy Policy
privacidad.intro: At RALQ, we value our users' privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information within our educational platform.
privacidad.s1Intro: We may collect basic information necessary for the platform's operation:
privacidad.s1l1: Name and email provided during registration.
privacidad.s1l2: Information related to the use of 3D models and navigation within the platform.
privacidad.s1l3: Basic browser and device information to optimize the experience.
privacidad.s2l1: Maintain the safe operation of the platform.
privacidad.s2l2: Improve the educational and interactive experience.
privacidad.s2l3: Optimize the performance of 3D models and visual tools.
privacidad.s2l4: Respond to messages sent from the contact form.
privacidad.s3Intro: RALQ does not sell users' personal information.
privacidad.s3l1: Used to manage accounts and user sessions.
privacidad.s3l2: Used to keep the platform running.
privacidad.s3l3: Information may only be shared if legally required.
privacidad.s4: We use essential cookies to save preferences and maintain active sessions within the platform.
privacidad.s5: We implement security measures to protect user information and maintain a safe experience within RALQ.
privacidad.s6: If you have questions about this policy, you can communicate through our

terminos.title: Terms and Conditions
terminos.intro: By using RALQ, you accept the following terms related to the use of our educational platform.
terminos.s1: RALQ offers interactive educational experiences through 3D models, Augmented Reality visualization, and resources focused on chemistry learning.
terminos.s2Intro: By using the platform, you agree to:
terminos.s2l1: Use RALQ only for educational purposes.
terminos.s2l2: Not copy or distribute content without authorization.
terminos.s2l3: Not attempt to breach platform security.
terminos.s2l4: Not use RALQ for improper or illegal activities.
terminos.s3: Some functions require a registered account. Each user is responsible for the use and security of their credentials.
terminos.s4: The models, interfaces, animations, and visual content belong to their respective authors and are protected by corresponding rights.
terminos.s5: RALQ is an educational tool and does not replace supervised real practices within a professional laboratory.
terminos.s6: The terms may be updated at any time to improve platform operation and security.
